name: christianmacion-portfolio
description: Christian T. Macion — AI Engineer + Quantitative Researcher. Personal portfolio site.

scripts.prebuild: node scripts/build-resumes.mjs && node scripts/build-resumes-md.mjs && node scripts/build-og-image.mjs && node scripts/optimize-assets.mjs && node scripts/build-earth-110m.mjs
scripts.build:mirror: BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://christianmacion-portfolio.pages.dev astro build --base=/ && node scripts/build-llms-full.mjs && cp public/llms-full.txt dist/llms-full.txt && node scripts/asset-audit.mjs && pagefind --site dist --output-subdir _pagefind
scripts.deploy:mirror: npm run build:mirror && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name christianmacion-portfolio --commit-dirty=true --branch main
scripts.postbuild: node scripts/asset-audit.mjs && pagefind --site dist --output-subdir _pagefind && python3 tools/scorecard_aggregator.py
scripts.ci: npm run lint:md && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run knip && npm run no-bulbs && npm run build && npm run audit && npm run sitemap:check
